defaults.hook_cover_term: a very tight close up of Lionel Messi's face in a dark red and blue Barcelona jersey, his face filling the entire frame, sharp and clear

videos.video_subject: Spain wanted Lionel Messi to play for their national team since he grew up in Barcelona from age 13 and was eligible, but Messi always dreamed of representing Argentina and chose his home country instead
videos.video_script: Before he was Argentina's hero, Spain wanted Messi for their own national team. He grew up there and could have played for them. But he only ever wanted Argentina. Which makes you wonder,
videos.video_terms: Lionel Messi close up face, Lionel Messi Argentina celebration, Lionel Messi Barcelona, Lionel Messi serious face, Lionel Messi emotional, Lionel Messi celebration
